Package javadraw.internal

Class Animation

java.lang.Object
javadraw.internal.ObjectDrawObject
javadraw.internal.ObjectDrawShape
javadraw.internal.Animation
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Dependent, DrawableInterface
public class Animation extends ObjectDrawShape implements Serializable
